# Auto-generated by the ros2-sysmlv2 bridge pipeline. Regenerated on every run.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
project(autonomous_ground_robot)

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
endif()

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
find_package(rclcpp_lifecycle REQUIRED)
find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(nav_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(sensor_msgs REQUIRED)

add_executable(lidar_driver
  src/lidar_driver_node.cpp
  src/lidar_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(lidar_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(lidar_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(imu_driver
  src/imu_driver_node.cpp
  src/imu_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(imu_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(imu_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(camera_driver
  src/camera_driver_node.cpp
  src/camera_driver_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(camera_driver PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(camera_driver
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(obstacle_detector
  src/obstacle_detector_node.cpp
  src/obstacle_detector_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(obstacle_detector PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(obstacle_detector
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(e_k_f_localizer
  src/e_k_f_localizer_node.cpp
  src/e_k_f_localizer_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(e_k_f_localizer PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(e_k_f_localizer
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(path_planner
  src/path_planner_node.cpp
  src/path_planner_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(path_planner PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(path_planner
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(trajectory_tracker
  src/trajectory_tracker_node.cpp
  src/trajectory_tracker_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(trajectory_tracker PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(trajectory_tracker
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(a_g_r_velocity_smoother
  src/a_g_r_velocity_smoother_node.cpp
  src/a_g_r_velocity_smoother_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(a_g_r_velocity_smoother PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(a_g_r_velocity_smoother
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(collision_guard
  src/collision_guard_node.cpp
  src/collision_guard_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(collision_guard PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(collision_guard
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(static_map_server
  src/static_map_server_node.cpp
  src/static_map_server_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(static_map_server PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(static_map_server
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

add_executable(mission_coordinator
  src/mission_coordinator_node.cpp
  src/mission_coordinator_node_base.cpp)
target_include_directories(mission_coordinator PRIVATE include)
ament_target_dependencies(mission_coordinator
  rclcpp
  rclcpp_lifecycle
  geometry_msgs
  nav_msgs
  sensor_msgs
)

install(TARGETS
  lidar_driver
  imu_driver
  camera_driver
  obstacle_detector
  e_k_f_localizer
  path_planner
  trajectory_tracker
  a_g_r_velocity_smoother
  collision_guard
  static_map_server
  mission_coordinator
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})

# Language-neutral Python helpers (same scripts as the ament_python package).
install(PROGRAMS
  scripts/conformance_monitor
  scripts/activate_nodes
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})

install(DIRECTORY launch config
  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME})

ament_package()
